contextControl.proxyPort.description: Port the FastAPI proxy listens on.

contextControl.autoStartProxy.description: Spawn the FastAPI proxy automatically when the panel opens. Disable if you run the backend yourself.

contextControl.backendDir.description: Absolute path to the FastAPI backend (directory containing main.py). Empty: use <workspace>/backend when present, otherwise the copy bundled in the extension.

contextControl.pythonPath.description: Path to the Python interpreter used to run uvicorn. Empty = auto-detect 'backend/venv/bin/python', falling back to 'python3'.

contextControl.webviewDistDir.description: Absolute path to the built React app (Vite output with index.html). Empty: use <workspace>/frontend/dist when present, otherwise the copy bundled inside the extension (extensions/dist in the repo; packaged into the VSIX).

scripts.bundle-all: npm run build:frontend && npm run compile && npm run bundle-webview && npm run bundle-backend
